buttons.primary: bg-[#17C3C9] hover:bg-[#34C7C7] text-white font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.dark: bg-[#143838] hover:bg-[#1D4F4F] text-white font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#17C3C9] text-[#17C3C9] hover:bg-[#17C3C9] hover:text-white font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-50 hover:bg-red-100 text-red-600 font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-colors

cards.service: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl group cursor-pointer shadow-lg
cards.service_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent flex flex-col justify-end p-6
cards.technician: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg overflow-hidden flex flex-col items-center p-6 text-center transition-transform hover:-translate-y-2 duration-300
cards.schedule: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 p-6 flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-6 items-start sm:items-center

layout_sections.navbar: bg-[#1D4F4F] text-white sticky top-0 z-50 shadow-md
layout_sections.chatbot: bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-500 to-purple-500 text-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl max-w-4xl mx-auto p-8 border border-white/20 backdrop-blur-md
layout_sections.cta: bg-[#1D4F4F] text-white rounded-3xl overflow-hidden relative shadow-2xl

pages.name: Home
sections: Navbar with logo, nav links, 24 Hour Services badge
Hero split section with bold text and dual technician images
Teca AI Chatbot section (gradient pink/purple bg, chat input, suggestion chips)
Service Carousel (cards with background images, gradient overlays, cyan button)
Nearest Technicians (cyan background, white cards with technician photos and dark 'Panggilan' button)
Benefits section (dark teal background, SVG wave separator at top, 2-column layout with 5 features)
How it works (3 large numbered steps, technician photo on right)
CTA (dark teal background, person holding phone image on right)

pages.name: Services
sections: Grid of all service cards (Instalasi Listrik, CCTV, Service AC, dll)

pages.name: Service Detail / Booking
sections: Booking Form in dark green (#143838): problem selection, property type, calendar, time slot, vehicle requirement, estimated price, 'Buat Pesanan' CTA

pages.name: Schedule
sections: List of upcoming service appointments. White cards on light gray background.
Each card has service image, technician name, date/time, and 'Reschedule' (Cyan) / 'Cancel' (Red/Text) buttons

pages.name: History
sections: List of past service appointments. Similar to schedule but with status badges (Completed, Cancelled)

pages.name: Chatbot / Teca
sections: Dedicated full-page AI Chatbot interface for Teca with conversation history, pink/purple gradient styling, suggestion chips

components_instructions: Use purely standard React+Tailwind for complex marketing sections like Hero and Benefits.
Use shadcn/ui Calendar for the date picker in Booking.
Use shadcn/ui Select for dropdowns in the Booking form (property type, vehicle).
Use shadcn/ui Input for chatbot inputs and newsletter.
Use shadcn/ui Dialog for Reschedule/Cancel confirmations if needed.
Use lucide-react for all icons (check, calendar, map-pin, phone, etc).
In the Chatbot section, ensure the pink/purple gradient is vibrant and has good contrast for white text.
rules: Include data-testid on ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, cards)
Do NOT use placeholder image URLs under any circumstances
Maintain high contrast ratios for text on backgrounds
Icons MUST be imported from lucide-react
Do not center-align everything; use deliberate layout grids
Ensure the application works perfectly as a static UI frontend without backend dependencies
